stepTexts.0: Today you'll beg with your throat open, while counting. Your voice helps you take it. Warm up.
stepTexts.12: Throat open. Count out loud to five while you beg me.
stepTexts.17: Mouth free, say it again: "I counted to five for you".
stepTexts.25: Take throat again. Count to six this time, no breaking.
stepTexts.31: Now beg: "let me count even longer".
stepTexts.39: Last one. Throat open, count to ten.
